ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument */,
  "last" REAL /* Last traded price of the financial instrument */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous data point */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the financial instrument */,
  "trading_session" TEXT /* Trading session (e.g., morning, afternoon, evening) */,
  "market_status" TEXT /* Market status (e.g., opened, closed, halted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES instruments ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., stock, option, future) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being traded */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the financial instrument traded */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission paid for the trade */,
  "trading_fees" REAL /* Trading fees for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "risk_limit" REAL /* Risk limit for the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, inactive, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account owning the position */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument in the position */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument in the position */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the position */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Exit price of the position */,
  "position_status" TEXT /* Position status (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account owning the order */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument in the order */,
  "side" TEXT /* Side of the order (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the financial instrument in the order */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of the order (e.g., market, limit, stop) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Order status (e.g., pending, filled, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management setting */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account owning the risk management setting */,
  "risk_limit" REAL /* Risk limit for the account */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop loss price for the account */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take profit price for the account */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the performance metric */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument in the performance metric */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the investment */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the investment */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio of the investment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feed" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument related to the news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feed_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
